headline: Vertex Pharma Makes A $10 Billion Deal; Crinetics Stock Doubles
summary: Crinetics stock nearly doubled late Monday after Vertex Pharmaceuticals pledged $10 billion to buy the endocrinology-focused biotech company.

headline: Crinetics soars on $10B acquisition by Vertex
summary: Investing.com -- Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated announced Monday it will acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. for $85.00 per share in cash, representing a total equity value of approximately $10.0 billion, or approximately $8.8 billion net of estimated cash acquired.

headline: Vertex to Acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals
summary: BOSTON & SAN DIEGO, July 06, 2026--Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (Nasdaq: VRTX) and Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX), a global pharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of novel therapeutics for endocrine diseases, today announced that the companies have entered into a definitive agreement under which Vertex will acquire Crinetics for $85.00 per share in cash, for a total equity value of approximately $10.0 billion, or approximately $8

headline: Vertex Signs Letter of Intent (LOI) with the pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance for ALYFTREK for the Treatment of Cystic Fibrosis
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals today announced that it has signed a Letter of Intent (LOI) with the pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance (pCPA) for PrALYFTREK® (vanzacaftor/tezacaftor/deutivacaftor), a new triple combination therapy for the treatment of cystic fibrosis (CF) in patients aged 6 years and older who have at least one F508del mutation or another responsive mutation in the cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator (CFTR) gene.
